sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40778" key="e)pi/rutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίρῠτος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίρροφ-ον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n40778.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπίρρυτος</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg002:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
